zhCN: 德尔塞尼斯的魔法弩箭

enUS:
Helm: adds to dexterity
Shield: adds resistance to poison
Weapon: adds poison damage to attack
zhCN:
头盔：提高敏捷
护盾：提高毒素抗性
武器：攻击附加毒素伤害

enUS:
Helm: adds to maximum life
Shield: adds resistance to fire
Weapon: adds fire damage to attack
zhCN:
头盔：提高生命上限
护盾：提高火焰抗性
武器：攻击附加火焰伤害

enUS:
Helm: adds to attack rating
Shield: adds to all resistances
Weapon: adds to damage vs. undead
zhCN:
头盔：提高攻击准确率
护盾：提高所有抗性
武器：提高对不死怪物的伤害

enUS:
Helm: adds mana and life regeneration
Shield: adds attacker takes damage
Weapon: adds mana and life steal to attack
zhCN:
头盔：提高法力和生命恢复率
护盾：提高攻击者反伤
武器：攻击附加法力和生命窃取

enUS: Adds Mana and Life Steal to Attack
zhCN: 攻击附加法力和生命窃取

enUS: ÿc@If you have at least 1000 dexterity, your Wolves can use Pounce
zhCN: ÿc@敏捷至少 1000 时，你的狼可以使用猛扑

enUS: ÿc@You have a small chance to gain maximum cooldown reduction for 3 seconds on kill
zhCN: ÿc@击杀时有小几率获得最大冷却缩减，持续 3 秒

enUS:
ÿc@15%% additional Physical Damage and 5%% Summon Damage per Level
Undead Frenzy has 0 Cooldown and Reap Souls now provides
Maximum Number of All Other Summons Reduced to 1
You can Summon +%d Additional Skeleton Kings with no Cooldown
zhCN:
ÿc@每级增加 15%% 额外物理伤害和 5%% 召唤伤害
亡灵狂乱无冷却，收割灵魂现在提供该效果
所有其他召唤物的最大数量减少至 1
你可以额外召唤 +%d 个骷髅王且无冷却

enUS:
lose all damage and attack rating from levels and synergies
Those skills fire an extra arrow at a nearby enemy every 3 attacks, but
ÿc@Magic, Cold, Exploding Arrowÿc0

and an ÿc;Anvil Stoneÿc0 to empower it with as following
Transmute this with a Precision Bow variant, a ÿc5Spider's Silkÿc0
zhCN:
ÿc@魔法箭、冰冷箭、爆炸箭ÿc0
这些技能每 3 次攻击会向附近敌人额外发射一支箭，但失去来自等级和协同的所有伤害与攻击准确率

将此物品与精准弓变体、ÿc5蜘蛛丝ÿc0和ÿc;锻造石ÿc0合成以增强如下

enUS: ÿc@Gain 1% to All Maximum Resistances per 1000 Strength
zhCN: ÿc@每 1000 点力量获得 1% 所有抗性上限

enUS:
ÿc@per each level of Fists of Fire, Blades of Ice or Claws of Thunder, respectively
You have a 45% chance to gain either 5% Fire, Cold or Lightning Spell Damage
zhCN: ÿc@每有 1 级火焰之拳、冰之刃或雷电之爪，分别有 45% 几率获得 5% 火焰、冰冷或闪电法术伤害

enUS: ÿc@Attacks have a 3% chance to deal five times more total damage
zhCN: ÿc@攻击有 3% 几率造成五倍总伤害

enUS:
Use the power of your mind to turn your enemies' brains to mush
The effort is so intense that it leaves you vulnerable to the physical world
Always hits
zhCN:
利用心灵力量将敌人的脑部化为浆糊
此举极为耗神，使你在物理世界中更易受伤
必定命中

enUS:
You have a 10% chance to triple the number of hits
If both Psychic Hammer and Mind Blast have 20 levels:
zhCN:
你有 10% 几率使命中次数变为三倍
如果心灵之锤和心灵冲击都有 20 级：

enUS:
You have a 10% chance to refresh the cooldown instantly
If both Mind Blast and Psychic Hammer have 20 levels:
zhCN:
你有 10% 几率立即刷新冷却时间
如果心灵冲击和心灵之锤都有 20 级：

enUS: Telekinesis, Energy Shield, Time Stop: %+d%% Lightning Damage per Level
zhCN: 心灵传动、能量护盾、时间停止：每级 %+d%% 闪电伤害

enUS:
Projectiles Maim, Impairing Movement and Increasing Physical Damage Taken
If both Tornado Shot and Sharpened Focus have 20 levels:
zhCN:
投射物造成致残，削弱移动能力并提高承受的物理伤害
如果龙卷风射击和锐化专注都有 20 级：

enUS:
Enchants the equipped weapon of the targeted character or minion.
Adds cold damage to all weapons.
zhCN:
为目标角色或随从的装备武器附魔。
为所有武器增加冰冷伤害。

enUS: Increases your fire pierce, defense rating and life regeneration
zhCN: 增加你的火焰穿透、防御评级和生命恢复速度

enUS:
increases your lightning pierce, defense
rating and total attack and movement speed
zhCN: 增加你的闪电穿透、防御评级以及总攻击和移动速度

enUS:
warns of impending danger and improves the defense
rating of you and your party
zhCN: 预警迫近的危险，并提高你和队伍成员的防御

enUS:
When active, aura increases stamina recovery rate, maximum stamina
and movement speed for you and your party
Increases gold and magic find based on total stamina
zhCN:
启用时，光环提高你和队伍成员的耐力恢复速度、最大耐力和移动速度
根据总耐力提高金币和魔法物品掉落

enUS: +%d%% Gold and Magic Find per 2400 Stamina
zhCN: 每 2400 点耐力 +%d%% 金币和魔法物品掉落

enUS: Gold and Magic Find from Stamina: +%d%%
zhCN: 耐力提供金币和魔法物品掉落：+%d%%
每 9600 点耐力 +%d%% 最大生命

enUS:
Attempt to find a rejuvenation potion
in the corpse of a slain enemy
zhCN: 尝试在被击败敌人的尸体中找到一瓶回复药剂

enUS:
Create a magical flaming missile to scorch your target
Every cast of Fire Bolt grants one Firestarter stack
Each Firestarter stack adds microexplosions on impact
zhCN:
创造一枚魔法火焰飞弹，灼烧你的目标
每次施放火焰箭获得一层火种堆叠
每层火种堆叠会在命中时触发微型爆炸

enUS:
passive - your missiles have a chance to
pass through enemies that they hit
zhCN: 被动 - 你的远程攻击有一定几率在击中时穿透敌人

enUS:
Magically enhances a bolt or arrow
to split into several shards upon impact
which seek nearby enemies
zhCN:
魔法强化弩箭或箭矢
命中时分裂成数个追踪附近敌人的碎片

enUS:
Magically enhances a bolt or arrow
to explode on impact and trigger
an additional explosion for each enemy affected
zhCN:
魔法强化弩箭或箭矢
命中时爆炸并为每个受影响敌人触发额外爆炸

enUS:
Fire an arrow or bolt to create a pyre
upon impact. Every third arrow or bolt is enhanced,
releasing consuming fires that seek down enemies
Always hits
zhCN:
射出箭矢或弩箭，命中时燃起烈火。每三支箭或弩箭会强化，释放追踪敌人的吞噬烈焰。
必定命中

enUS:
Fire an arrow or bolt that freezes enemies in an
area of effect. Every third arrow or bolt is enhanced, spawning
icy shards that track down and destroy your enemies
Always hits
zhCN:
射出箭矢或弩箭，冻结范围内的敌人。每三支箭或弩箭会强化，产生追踪并摧毁敌人的冰冷碎片
必定命中

enUS:
Lay a trap that shoots devastating lightning
bolts that stun enemies that are hit
zhCN: 设置一个陷阱，发射毁灭性的闪电箭，击中敌人会使其昏迷

enUS:
Fire a poison arrow that explodes on impact,
dealing area of effect damage. Every third arrow or bolt is enhanced,
dealing double damage in a bigger area of effect
Always hits
zhCN:
射出一支毒箭，命中时爆炸，造成范围伤害。每第三支箭或弩箭强化，造成双倍伤害并扩大范围
必定命中

enUS:
Lobs an incendiary javelin that explodes
on impact, releasing a nova of fire
Deals more damage near the center
Always hits
zhCN:
抛掷燃烧标枪，撞击时爆炸释放火焰新星
中心附近伤害更高
必定命中

enUS:
Fire a lightning arrow that splits into several bolts
on impact. Every third arrow or bolt is enhanced, making the secondary
bolts split into an additional bolt on hitting an enemy
Always hits
zhCN:
射出一支闪电箭，命中时分裂成数支箭矢
每第三支箭或弩箭强化，使次级箭矢在命中敌人时再分裂出一支箭矢
必定命中

enUS:
Fire a projectile that releases several secondary
projectiles on impact in a circular pattern
zhCN: 发射一枚投射物，击中目标后释放多枚次级投射物，以环状散射。

enUS: Strike with such force that you stun all enemies in the area
zhCN: 以强大力量攻击，震晕区域内所有敌人

enUS:
Perform a devastating attack, dealing massive
area of effect damage to all nearby enemies
zhCN:
执行毁灭性攻击，对附近所有敌人
造成巨大范围伤害

enUS:
Summon forth a pulsating orb of ice
to lay waste on your enemies
zhCN:
召唤脉动冰球
摧毁你的敌人

enUS:
Unleash the fury of the
nature's sky to decimate the battlefield
zhCN:
释放自然天空之怒
席卷战场

enUS:
Blast an area with a freezing ice nova
then release devastating winds that
track down and shred your enemies
zhCN:
以冰霜新星轰炸区域
然后释放追踪并撕裂敌人的毁灭性狂风

enUS:
passive - improves various stats
while in any shapeshifting form
zhCN:
被动 - 在任何变形形态下
提升各项属性
前往世界之石要塞第一层
前往世界之石要塞第二层
进入世界之石要塞第一层
进入世界之石要塞第二层
